## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI / visual change
- [ ] Test change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / packaging
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `dotnet build`
- [ ] I have run `dotnet test`
- [ ] I have manually tested the affected workflow
- [ ] I have updated documentation where appropriate

## Snapshot testing

- [ ] This change does not affect UI snapshots
- [ ] This change intentionally updates UI snapshots
- [ ] I have reviewed the generated snapshot differences
- [ ] I have updated baselines using `UPDATE_SNAPSHOTS=1 dotnet test`

## Notes

Add any review notes, known limitations, or follow-up work.
